acceptance_criteria.description: A chat instruction is grounded to visible stable entity IDs or explicitly clarified before any effectful action is leased.
The agent plans and executes pickup/place through Godot, adapts to a material interruption, and rejects stale or revoked intent.
The Controller Lab exposes chat, binding status, active constraints, plan/receipt timeline, and replay readiness without exposing protected state.
A deterministic conversational demo seals and independently verifies an offline replay with zero provider calls.

in: Chat intake, grounded referent binding, intent revisions, constrained planning, and player-visible status.
New warehouse-style WorldArena environment, Controller Lab surface, deterministic demo, and offline-verifiable replay.
out: Arbitrary code generation, hidden-state access, opaque execute-skill commands, or changes to released WorldArena behavior.

summary: Compile human chat into grounded, constrained, replayable WorldArena task execution without granting chat or the game direct strategic authority.
title: Conversational Embodied Sandbox
